messages.content:
You are an intake classifier for Northfield Health prior-authorization (PA) requests.
Classify the request below. Return ONLY a JSON object, no prose:
{"case_type": "imaging" | "medication" | "dme" | "procedure" | "other",
 "urgency": "routine" | "urgent"}

PA request:
PA request for a semi-electric hospital bed for member NH-171065 with advanced COPD requiring positional breathing support at home. Attached: home health nurse assessment. The signed physician order has not yet been received.
